upstreamBehavior: Mermaid renders point radius/color/stroke metadata and classDef styling for quadrant charts. Agentic Mermaid preserves the source and renders the chart, but typed mutation/layout metadata intentionally does not model those styling attributes yet.
notes: Executable ledger: the corpus test proves the official styled example parses, verifies with UNSUPPORTED_SYNTAX, and round-trips without dropping style source.

upstreamBehavior: Mermaid's architecture syntax supports alignment edges (`align` between groups/services). Agentic Mermaid parses and round-trips these sources, but the local render parser rejects the `align` edge source, so verify reports Tier-1 RENDER_FAILED (a clean verify must prove the source renders).
notes: Executable ledger: closing the architecture align-edge render gap (#101) re-imports these; the BUILD-20 upstream-suite exclusions carry the same issue.
